ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "markdown" TEXT /* Markdown content of the article */,
  "published_on" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL or path to the thumbnail image of the article */,
  "excerpt" TEXT /* A short summary or excerpt of the article */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video, multimedia) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the article */,
  "social_media_shares" TEXT /* JSON object to track shares on different social media platforms */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the article */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the article */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created in the system */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the author's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Author's status (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* An integer representing the popularity of the tag (e.g., number of articles using the tag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag associated with the article */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who added the tag to the article */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was added to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the comment */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Total number of replies to the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment if it's a reply */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, reader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created in the system */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the article */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was viewed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., mobile, desktop) from which the view was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (IP or geolocation) from which the view was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., site, user, system) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the notification is intended */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, publish, like) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article to be published */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time at which the article is scheduled to be published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_history" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article that was revised */,
  "revision_content" TEXT /* Content of the revision */,
  "revised_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the revision was made */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the revision */,
  "revised_content_type" TEXT /* Type of content revised (e.g., markdown, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who subscribed */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article the user subscribed to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription was created */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., article, tag, author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
